name: OpenClaw
summary: OpenClaw Device-Paired Node Skips Node Scope Gate → Host RCE.md
description:
Summary
Device-Paired Node Skips Node Scope Gate → Host RCE.md

Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: open
- Normalized severity: high
- Assessment: Real in shipped v2026.3.28 because a merely device-paired node could expose node commands without node pairing, but high is sufficient given the pairing/setup prerequisites.

Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: openclaw (npm)
- Latest published npm version: 2026.3.31
- Vulnerable version range: <=2026.3.28
- Patched versions: >= 2026.3.31
- First stable tag containing the fix: v2026.3.31
suggestion: Upgrade openclaw to >= 2026.3.31 or later. Commit(s) - 3886b65ef21d02808c1a106fa1f9f69e22f71c32 — 2026-03-30T17:29:28+01:00
